race.comment: Found this race incredibly open. PRINCESS PAINTON (11) resumes having gone to the paddock a maiden winner over 2000m at Ballarat. She'd been promising a win for a bit with consistent form and can pick up where she left off at a suitable trip from a perfect gate. ENCHANTED JENNI (2) will find this easier than last start at Sandown Lakeside when struggling. Her form prior is rock solid for this. BAYWATCH (12) is off a let up but comes a fair way back in grade off recent runs and can improve. Wary of STAPHANI (9) who won in New Zealand on debut and now comes here for the Price & Kent Jnr yard. Watch the betting. QUEEN OF THE SURF (13) is going okay on synthetic, to heavy turf here is an unknown but she's in the mix.
